workspace.title: YouTube Download Workspace
workspace.subtitle: YouTube and YouTube Music share this workspace; all other sites are separate.
workspace.placeholder:
Paste one YouTube URL per line. Put a playlist on its own line, for example:
https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL...
workspace.initial_preview: Enter a YouTube video or playlist URL to inspect and select items in batches.
workspace.wrong_site: This workspace accepts only YouTube URLs. Switch to the matching site workspace.

youtube.name: Batch Download
youtube.purpose: Video, audio, playlist and batch downloads with audio preview

youtube-search.name: Search
youtube-search.purpose: Search public YouTube and YouTube Music content

youtube-similar.name: Similar Content
youtube-similar.purpose: Find a random similar video or track

youtube-auto-split.name: Auto Split
youtube-auto-split.purpose: Analyze and preview split points in long videos
